function: async () => { const dot = document.querySelector('[data-cursor-dot]'); dot.style.transform = 'translate3d(450px, 400px, 0)'; dot.setAttribute('data-test', '1'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 50)); const rect = dot.getBoundingClientRect(); const cx = Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2); const cy = Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2); const top = document.elementFromPoint(cx, cy); const all = document.elementsFromPoint(cx, cy).slice(0, 5).map(e => e.tagName + '.' + (typeof e.className === 'string' ? e.className.slice(0, 30) : '') + ' z=' + getComputedStyle(e).zIndex); return { rect: { x: rect.x, y: rect.y, w: rect.width, h: rect.height }, transform: dot.style.transform, topEl: top ? top.tagName + '.' + (typeof top.className === 'string' ? top.className.slice(0, 30) : '') : null, all: all, isDotTop: top === dot }; }
